scripts.build: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/write-dist-readme.mjs && node scripts/link-load-folder.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs && vite build && node scripts/write-dist-readme.mjs && node scripts/link-load-folder.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
